tagline: Flexible protection with investment growth potential.
product_description: A variable life insurance plan designed for clients who need life protection with potential fund value growth and flexible payment terms.
key_benefits: Flexible premium payments
Fund value growth potential
Adjustable coverage

available_riders.sum_assured_label: Annual premium waived on covered disability

example_quotation.notes: Illustrative only. Final premium, charges, and fund values depend on underwriting, selected funds, riders, and policy settings.

exclusions_or_limitations: Fund value subject to market performance

tagline: Budget-efficient life protection for families and income earners.
product_description: A term life insurance plan focused on high life protection for a defined coverage period, with optional riders for added protection layers.
key_benefits: High protection amount for lower premium
Simple death benefit coverage
Optional riders for added protection

example_quotation.notes: Illustrative only. Final premium depends on age, underwriting, coverage amount, policy term, and selected riders.

compliance_notes: Advisor must validate coverage amount and term suitability before proposal.

tagline: Health-focused protection for hospitalization and critical illness needs.
product_description: A health-focused protection plan for clients who want support for hospitalization and critical illness exposure.
key_benefits: Hospitalization support
Critical illness protection
Optional hospital income riders

example_quotation.notes: Illustrative only. Final premium depends on health declarations, underwriting, coverage options, and selected riders.

exclusions_or_limitations: Existing health coverage may reduce urgency
compliance_notes: Health declarations and underwriting review required.

tagline: Limited 5-year pay, lifetime protection and growth.
product_description: A limited-pay VUL designed for clients who can commit to a higher five-year premium schedule in exchange for lifetime protection and investment-linked growth potential.
key_benefits: Premiums paid for only 5 years, coverage continues for life
Fixed contractual base sum assured unaffected by fund withdrawals
No surrender charges on withdrawals after Year 5 once fully paid
Fund value growth potential through underlying investment funds

available_riders.sum_assured_label: Annual premium waived on covered disability
Accelerated from the base sum assured

example_quotation.profile: Age 35, standard underwriting class, 5-year limited-pay illustration
example_quotation.notes: Illustrative only. Verify minimum premium, age bands, rider availability, charges, and withdrawal rules against current Elite Series PDFs before client use.

exclusions_or_limitations: Higher premium commitment over a short pay period vs regular-pay VUL
COI deductions still apply post-paid-up period and increase with age
Fund value, not base sum assured, is affected by withdrawals
compliance_notes: Loyalty bonus warnings circulating in the market apply to Elite-15, not Elite-5. Verify which series before client-facing claims. Requires FNA before recommendation.
review_note: Verify against Elite_Series_Primer.pdf and Elite_PHS_PRUOne.pdf: exact minimum premium, age bands, rider list, and withdrawal/surrender charge mechanics.

tagline: 15-year pay structure balancing affordability and lifetime coverage.
product_description: A limited-pay VUL structured for a longer 15-year premium commitment, balancing lower annual cash flow pressure with lifetime protection and investment-linked growth potential.
key_benefits: Lower per-year premium commitment than Elite-5 for similar coverage
Lifetime coverage after 15-year pay period
Fund value growth potential through underlying investment funds

available_riders.sum_assured_label: Annual premium waived on covered disability
Accelerated from the base sum assured

example_quotation.profile: Age 35, standard underwriting class, 15-year limited-pay illustration
example_quotation.notes: Illustrative only. Loyalty bonus terms and conditions must be verified for Elite-15 before presenting any client-facing claim.

exclusions_or_limitations: Loyalty bonus structure and conditions differ from Elite-5 and must be confirmed before quoting
COI deductions increase with age and continue to apply
Longer pay commitment period than Elite-5
compliance_notes: Verify loyalty bonus terms specifically for Elite-15 against current primer before presenting to client. Requires FNA before recommendation.
review_note: Verify against Elite_Series_Primer.pdf and Elite_PHS_PRUOne.pdf: exact minimum premium, age bands, loyalty bonus mechanics, and rider list.

tagline: Goal-oriented wealth building with built-in protection.
product_description: A VUL positioned for long-term wealth accumulation goals while retaining life protection for milestone funding needs such as education or retirement seed capital.
key_benefits: Structured around long-term wealth accumulation goals
Life protection bundled with investment growth potential
Suited for milestone funding such as education or retirement seed fund

available_riders.sum_assured_label: Accelerated from the base sum assured
Annual premium waived on covered disability

example_quotation.profile: Age 35, standard underwriting class, regular-pay VUL illustration
example_quotation.notes: Illustrative only. Verify minimum premium, pay term options, charges, fund options, and rider list against current PRUMillionaire PDFs.

exclusions_or_limitations: Fund value subject to market performance, not guaranteed
Early withdrawal in initial years may incur charges
compliance_notes: Requires FNA before recommendation. Wealth-accumulation positioning must be paired carefully with client's actual risk appetite.
review_note: Verify against PRUMillionaire_Primer.pdf and PRUMillionaire_PHS_PRUOne.pdf: exact minimum premium, pay term options, charges, fund mechanics, and rider list.

tagline: Disciplined savings plan with a maturity payout, built for goal milestones.
product_description: A traditional endowment-style plan for conservative clients who want disciplined savings, life protection, and a maturity payout aligned to education or other milestone goals.
key_benefits: Lump-sum maturity benefit aligned to a savings goal or timeline
Built-in life protection during the pay period
Simple traditional structure, not market-value dependent like VUL

example_quotation.profile: Age 35, standard underwriting class, education milestone illustration
example_quotation.notes: Illustrative only. Verify maturity structure, pay terms, benefits, and exact minimum premium against the current PRU PEP product primer.

exclusions_or_limitations: Lower growth potential than VUL-type products and not designed for aggressive growth
Early surrender may yield less than premiums paid
compliance_notes: Good fit for conservative, budget-sensitive clients prioritizing certainty over growth. Requires FNA before recommendation.
review_note: Verify against PRU_PEP_Product_Primer_PEP.pdf: exact maturity structure, pay terms, benefits, and minimum premium.

tagline: Guaranteed income stream for retirement or estate conservation strategies.
product_description: An income-focused product positioned for retirement income and estate conservation conversations where predictable periodic income and liquidity planning are central.
key_benefits: Predictable, guaranteed periodic income payout
Useful for estate conservation and liquidity-for-estate-tax strategies
Lower complexity than VUL because positioning is income-focused, not growth-focused

Liquidity may be limited once the single premium is committed
